title: Clearer navigation and event status for screen readers
description: Navbar controls now announce their purpose, the mobile menu can't trap keyboard focus, and event status no longer relies on color alone.
highlights: Every navbar icon button has a descriptive label
Mobile drawer focus trap hardened for keyboard users
Event status badges pair an icon with their color

title: Accessible dispute countdowns and vote tallies
description: Dispute resolution timers and vote tallies are now readable by screen readers and distinguishable without relying on color.
highlights: Live countdown announces time remaining to assistive tech
Colorblind-safe patterns on the vote tally bar

title: Dashboard KPI cards handle loading and errors gracefully
description: KPI cards and tabs on the dashboard now show proper loading skeletons, empty states, and retry options instead of blank space.
highlights: Skeleton loading state for KPI cards and tabs
Empty and error states with a retry action

title: Prediction card visuals moved to design tokens
description: Prediction cards and their status badges now use the shared design-token palette, improving contrast and theme consistency.
highlights: Status badges meet WCAG AA contrast in light and dark mode
